tagline.de: Welcome to the Kunsthaus Zurich. It's nice to have you here.
tagline.en: Welcome to the Kunsthaus Zurich. It's nice to have you here.

description.de:
Concrete, light, and silence. The Chipperfield Building was designed to disappear behind the art — to make room for looking.

Seven exhibitions wait for you across five floors. There is no wrong way through.
description.en:
Concrete, light, and silence. The Chipperfield Building was designed to disappear behind the art — to make room for looking.

Seven exhibitions wait for you across five floors. There is no wrong way through.

body.de: Finden Sie jedes Werk und jeden Raum. Unser interaktiver Besucher-Guide führt Sie durch beide Gebäude, Etage für Etage.
body.en: Find every work and every room. Our interactive visitor guide walks you through both buildings, floor by floor.

question.de: Wo kann ich Mäntel und Taschen abgeben?
question.en: Where can I leave my coats and bags?

answer.de: Komplimentäre Garderobe im Erdgeschoss des Chipperfield-Baus.
answer.en: Complimentary cloakroom on the ground floor of the Chipperfield Building.

question.de: Darf ich im Museum essen und trinken?
question.en: Am I allowed to eat and drink in the museum?

answer.de: Essen und Trinken nur in der Kunsthaus Bar und im Restaurant Bei Moudi.
answer.en: Eating and drinking only in the Kunsthaus Bar and Restaurant Bei Moudi.

question.en: Am I allowed to take photographs at the Kunsthaus?

answer.de: Fotografieren ohne Blitz erlaubt, ausser in den Ausstellungen Marisol und Kerry James Marshall.
answer.en: Photography allowed without flash, except in the Marisol and Kerry James Marshall exhibitions.
